# Pull Request

> 👋 Thanks for contributing to Technical Creators Club!
> Fill in the sections below — they help reviewers understand and merge your PR faster.

---

## 📋 What does this PR do?

<!-- Summarise the change in 1–3 sentences. What problem does it solve or what does it add? -->



## 🔗 Related issue

<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses. Use "Closes #NNN" to auto-close it on merge. -->

Closes #

## 🗂️ Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 📝 New blog post
- [ ] ✏️ Edit or fix to an existing post (typo, correction, improvement)
- [ ] 🎨 Site feature or UI improvement
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / workflow / config change
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update

---

## ✅ Checklist

> **For new posts** — please confirm all of these:

- [ ] My file is in `_posts/` and named `YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md`
- [ ] The front matter includes `layout`, `title`, `date`, `categories`, `author`, and `excerpt`
- [ ] I've read through my post for typos and clarity
- [ ] Code snippets (if any) are wrapped in fenced code blocks with a language tag (e.g. ` ```bash `)
- [ ] I've updated the **Latest Posts** table in `README.md`
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`

> **For all PRs:**

- [ ] My changes don't break the existing site (checked locally if possible)
- [ ] I haven't committed any secrets, tokens, or personal data

---

## 🖼️ Screenshots (optional)

<!-- For visual changes, a before/after screenshot helps a lot. Drag and drop images here. -->

---

## 💬 Anything else for the reviewer?

<!-- Anything they should know, test, or pay special attention to? -->
